questionHtml: Using a theory of the firm diagram, explain the output and pricing decision of M-Kopa if it chooses to pursue the goal of revenue maximization (paragraph [6]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be rewarded with a maximum of [3].

The use of P/C/R and Q/quantity/output on the axes is sufficient for a theory of the firm diagram. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using a theory of the firm diagram, explain the output and pricing decision of M-Kopa if it chooses to pursue the goal of revenue maximization (paragraph [6]).
